title: Little Things
description: A mod that adds a bunch of features that organically complement the game.
body:
**Little Things - they do matter!**

![Requires GeckoLib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dd146729ba99fe2a4c8cfaec9fc3703cf54a397.png)

So have I though too and decided to make this mod. Little Things doesn't add whole new branches of gameplay or any new complex mechanics, but instead it's main focus is to fill in the gaps and inconsistencies found around the base game. Whether builder, fighter or farmer, you'll find something that comes close. Some examples of features that you'll find in this mod are:

- Building blocks like stone variations, shingles and iron mesh.
- Natural details that enhance the environment.
- A flax crop as an alternative source of string.
- Alternative crafts with pebble that allow to skip wooden tools.
- Copper armor and tools.
- Spike traps that activate on step.
- Crystalized snowballs and a blowgun.
- Storage items for items and experience in form of the backpack and the medallion of wisdom respectively.
- Potion items for glowing and wither.
  
Hopefully these features can make your vanilla experience more complete and lively. Enjoy!

<sub>MCreator link: https://mcreator.net/modification/104137/little-things<sub>
